A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Tap on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Additional Context
